title: scry

features.title: server package handler coverage uplift
features.description:
internal/server is the lowest-coverage package at 33%. Handler
paths through query_execute (envelope shapes for invalid_query,
cost_exceeded, budget_exceeded, unknown_server, auth_expired,
upstream_error, permission_denied, rate_limited, pq_conflict,
pq_not_found, ok_cached, ok), schema_search variants, and
gate guards are mostly tested via smoke OR not at all. v0.5
target: 60%+ via direct handler unit tests that drive the
registered MCP tools through their internal closures, using
fakes for runtime.Entry + upstream.Client where needed.

features.title: End-to-end mutation testing
features.description:
v0.1–v0.4 unit-tested gate.Classify("mutation") and write
budget exhaustion, but no test exercises query_execute with
a mutation against a real GraphQL backend — validate → cost
→ gate write budget → upstream POST → audit record
outcome=ok effect=write. Pokémon GraphQL is read-only, SWAPI
too, so a live mutation smoke needs either a local docker
upstream or an in-process httptest fake. v0.5 ships:
  - httptest-backed mutation integration in
    internal/server/mutation_test.go (deterministic, fast)
  - documents the lack of a stable public mutation endpoint
    so future contributors don't reinvent the search
  - asserts: cache bypass on mutation, write counter
    increments only on outcome=ok, chain Evidence carries
    effect=write
